mapper.sql: Id, content, robotid, scriptcode, status, feekback_server, robotname, dt, starthour, startminute, execucount, updatetime, successtag, ispublic, paytag, feekback_robot, title, futuredate, reason, price,type,url
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_alltask
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_alltask (Id, content, robotid, scriptcode, status, feekback_server, robotname, dt, starthour, startminute, execucount, updatetime, successtag, ispublic, paytag, feekback_robot, title, futuredate, reason, price) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{robotid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{feekbackServer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{robotname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{starthour,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startminute,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{execucount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{successtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ispublic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paytag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{feekbackRobot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{futuredate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

insert into tb_alltask
Id,
content,
robotid,
scriptcode,
status,
feekback_server,
robotname,
dt,
starthour,
startminute,
execucount,
updatetime,
successtag,

futuredate,
reason,

mapper.update:
update tb_alltask
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{record.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
robotid = #{record.robotid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
scriptcode = #{record.scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
feekback_server = #{record.feekbackServer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
robotname = #{record.robotname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dt = #{record.dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
starthour = #{record.starthour,jdbcType=INTEGER},
startminute = #{record.startminute,jdbcType=INTEGER},
execucount = #{record.execucount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
updatetime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
successtag = #{record.successtag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ispublic = #{record.ispublic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paytag = #{record.paytag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
feekback_robot = #{record.feekbackRobot,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
futuredate = #{record.futuredate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update tb_alltask set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, content = #{record.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, robotid = #{record.robotid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, scriptcode = #{record.scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, feekback_server = #{record.feekbackServer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, robotname = #{record.robotname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dt = #{record.dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, starthour = #{record.starthour,jdbcType=INTEGER}, startminute = #{record.startminute,jdbcType=INTEGER}, execucount = #{record.execucount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updatetime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, successtag = #{record.successtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ispublic = #{record.ispublic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paytag = #{record.paytag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, feekback_robot = #{record.feekbackRobot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, futuredate = #{record.futuredate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update tb_alltask
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
robotid = #{robotid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
scriptcode = #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
feekback_server = #{feekbackServer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
robotname = #{robotname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dt = #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
starthour = #{starthour,jdbcType=INTEGER},
startminute = #{startminute,jdbcType=INTEGER},
execucount = #{execucount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
successtag = #{successtag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ispublic = #{ispublic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paytag = #{paytag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
feekback_robot = #{feekbackRobot,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
futuredate = #{futuredate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_alltask set content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, robotid = #{robotid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, scriptcode = #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, feekback_server = #{feekbackServer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, robotname = #{robotname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dt = #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, starthour = #{starthour,jdbcType=INTEGER}, startminute = #{startminute,jdbcType=INTEGER}, execucount = #{execucount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, successtag = #{successtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ispublic = #{ispublic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paytag = #{paytag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, feekback_robot = #{feekbackRobot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, futuredate = #{futuredate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
